title: Enel Crushes the Resistance
description: Wyper keeps fighting for Shandia’s homeland even as Enel’s lightning and the collapsing battlefield push him past his limits.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Enel, Aisa, Luffy, Eneru, Nami. Wyper keeps fighting for Shandia’s homeland even as Enel’s lightning and the collapsing battlefield push him past his limits.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Yet, one lightning beam from enel...

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Poor Aisa... still inside that thing!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: What was that for? Such bad manners.

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: There are exactly five over there!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: However, God's predictions can't be wrong...

summary: Wyper keeps fighting for Shandia’s homeland even as Enel’s lightning and the collapsing battlefield push him past his limits.
